def negative_multiple_config_sources_merged_without_documented_precedence_order():
    rule_id = "multiple_config_sources_merged_without_documented_precedence_order"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Application merges environment variables, config files, and defaults without explicit precedence documentation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
